prompt: Implement and export `fullJustify(words: string[], maxWidth: number): string[]` (LeetCode 68). Pack words greedily into lines so each line has as many words as fit with at least one space between adjacent words. Distribute spaces between words as EVENLY as possible; if the spaces don't divide evenly, the LEFTMOST gaps get the extra space(s). Every line must be exactly `maxWidth` characters. The LAST line and any line with a SINGLE word are LEFT-justified (single spaces between words) and padded with trailing spaces to `maxWidth`. Example: fullJustify(["This","is","an","example","of","text","justification."],16) === ["This    is    an","example  of text","justification.  "]. Use a named export. Output ONLY the complete file as a single fenced TypeScript code block.
check: bun -e 'const m=await import(process.env.OB1_FILE);const f=m.fullJustify??m.default;if(typeof f!=="function")process.exit(2);const C=JSON.parse(Buffer.from("","base64").toString());for(const c of C){let g;try{g=f.apply(null,c.input)}catch(e){console.error("threw "+JSON.stringify(c.input)+": "+e);process.exit(1)}if(JSON.stringify(g)!==JSON.stringify(c.expected)){console.error(JSON.stringify(c.input)+" => "+JSON.stringify(g)+" want "+JSON.stringify(c.expected));process.exit(1)}}'
